key.name: blocked-apps
key.description: List of application desktop IDs that are blocked. Format: "app.id.desktop|App Name"

key.name: last-blocked-apps
key.description: Snapshot of blocked apps saved when "Unblock all" is used, so the list can be restored.

key.name: blocking-enabled
key.description: Whether app blocking is currently active. When false, the blocked apps list is preserved but no windows are minimized.

key.name: toggle-shortcut
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to toggle app blocking on/off.
